scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-remote/shared && npm run build -w @codex-remote/bridge && npm run build -w @codex-remote/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @codex-remote/shared && npm run typecheck -w @codex-remote/bridge && npm run typecheck -w @codex-remote/web
scripts.bridge-setup: npm run build -w @codex-remote/bridge && node packages/bridge/dist/index.js setup
